modules.features:
• All earned/promised reward types (intro reward, earned loyalty rewards, tiers & their benefits, birthday rewards)
• The computation and qualification of purchase events

• Canonical record of the consumer (identity, communication preferences)
• Core repository of customer's historical relationship (purchase history, message history, reward history)
• Brokers access to the customer's account in the CRM

• Business logic to apply discounts properly (validation and computation)
• Reward state management (delivered, used, etc)
• Fraud management
• Assignation and management of terms

• Consumer experiences for account access, reward usage, Loyalty benefits
• Platform for messaging and brand expression
• Installation / destination for real time messaging

• Interface for browsing menus, building carts, and placing orders
• Payment storage & processing
• Application of rewards and benefits

• Rules engine for grouping of customers into segments
• Logic to automatically capture segment transitions and trigger messaging
• Reporting of customers in a segment and automation impact

• Issuance of email messages for campaigns
• Reporting of email engagement
• Customization of messages
• Preference management in CRM
• Compliance management

• Issuance of Push messages for campaigns
• Reporting of Push engagement
• Customization of messages
• Preference management in CRM

• Issuance of SMS messages for campaigns
• Reporting of SMS engagement
• Customization of messages
• Preference management in CRM
• Compliance management

• Audience/segment creation for targeting (using loyalty data or 3rd party)
• Issuance of advertising messaging
• Reporting of advertising engagement and impact
• Compliance management

• Importing and mapping of data from 3rd party platforms
• Audience creation/management
• Exporting of data to 3rd party platforms (bi-directional data hub)

• Ability to analyze numerous data structures ad-hoc
• Numerous visualizations
• Ability to export data in custom outputs
• Aggregation across data sources

• Consumers can submit feedback
• Ability to respond to customer feedback
• Ideally related to customer identity (CRM)

• Consumers can reserve seating at a specific time (including ASAP)
• Messaging about reservation status
• Management of table inventory

• Processing of gift card purchases
• Management of card balance
• Management of capital paid in to balances

• WiFi hardware / endpoints
• Customization of landing screen
• Data capture of customers signing into WiFi
